scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('index.html')) { console.error('FAIL: index.html not found'); process.exit(1); } console.log('Build OK — static site ready (index.html)');"
scripts.test: node tests/hero.test.js && node tests/skeleton.test.js && node tests/structure.test.js && node tests/how-it-works.test.js && node tests/no-api-key.test.js && node tests/get-started.test.js && node tests/footer.test.js && node tests/smooth-scroll.test.js && node tests/no-external-deps.test.js && node tests/seo.test.js && node tests/branding.test.js && node tests/rename.test.js && node tests/server-runtime-deps.test.js && node tests/asset-paths.test.js
